Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Continued To Mar-23-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-29-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and Letters Testamentary. Shari M. Lum and Jenifer K. Lum are appointed co-Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required Jenifer K. Lum. Bond is fixed at $20,000 for Shari M. Lum. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status hearing is set for Mar-02-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Personal Representatives shall file either a petition for order for final distribution or a petition for approval of report of status of administration pursuant to Prob. Code Sec.12200 et seq. two weeks before this date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-15-2025 Continued To Jan-29-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Continued To Jan-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-25-2024 Continued To Dec-23-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (via Zoom):
William Dawkins, for Shari M. Lum, Petitioner.

Discussions were held regarding multiple discrepancies and unresolved issues related to the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. Mr. Dawkins was informed of his failure to address the probate examiner's notes and was reminded that certain documents, such as the will and bond, must be filed in person rather than through e-filing. Mr. Dawkins was instructed to contact the probate examiner to resolve outstanding issues and clarify the examiner's notes. The court continued the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary to December 23, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow Mr. Dawkins time to file the necessary documents, including the original will and bond.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Deputy: Singh; Not reported (D204)
